title: juglans regia var. intermedia
intro: Juglans regia var. intermedia, also known as Manchurian walnut, is a variety of the English walnut tree (Juglans regia) that is native to East Asia. This tree is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Juglans regia var. intermedia include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the tree's leaves, bark, and seeds can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
